generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient temperature sensor (DS18B20 thermistor) mounted inside the incubator enclosure to measure temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series data stream of temperature measurements transmitted from the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance ThermalDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential-equation model describing the heat dynamics of the incubator core and enclosure."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, MonitoringEnabler
]

instance IncubatorCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD representation of the styrofoam incubator enclosure and heat‑bed layout."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MonitoringEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module using SciPy optimize for continuous model parameter estimation from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance MonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python monitoring module that evaluates safety limits (temperature bounds) and optimality (desired setpoint) using streaming data."
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python fault detection module leveraging statistical tests to flag anomalous temperature trends."
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python supervisory control module that calculates corrective heater/fan actions."
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python state estimator that updates internal state representation of temperature dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python optimization module that determines optimal heater/fan settings to meet constraints."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitating inter‑process communication between the Raspberry Pi physical twin and the digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs continuous parameter calibration of the thermal model."
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that monitors temperature safety limits and desired optimal setpoint in real‑time."
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyComplianceInsight, OptimalityComplianceInsight, PredictiveTemperatureInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that detects anomalies in temperature behavior indicative of faults."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultConditionInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that suggests corrective control actions for the heater and fan."
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlSuggestion, AdjustHeatBedAction, AdjustFanAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that produces updated state estimates of the incubator thermal system."
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that optimizes control actions to maintain temperature target while respecting safety."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that ensures reliable data transmission via RabbitMQ between physical twin and digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance PredictiveTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insight of future temperature trajectory under current operating conditions."
]

instance SafetyComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating whether temperature remains within safety bounds."
]

instance OptimalityComplianceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight evaluating whether temperature is within the optimal target range."
]

instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating updated model parameters after calibration."
]

instance FaultConditionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight revealing detected anomalous temperature behavior."
]

instance SupervisoryControlSuggestion : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight recommending corrective actions such as adjusting heater or fan."
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing updated state estimates of the incubator thermal system."
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing optimized heater and fan settings to maintain target temperature."
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful transmission of sensor data from the physical twin to the digital twin."
]

instance AdjustHeatBedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to set the heat‑bed element power level."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to set the fan speed for cooling or turbulence."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HeatBedElement : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Heat‑bed element that generates thermal energy inside the incubator."
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Fan providing cooling or turbulence to the incubator environment."
]

instance RaspberryPiModelB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B acting as the PLC‑style controller for the incubator."
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HeatBedElement, Fan, RaspberryPiModelB
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Within a Digital Twin system, the lifecycle progresses through a conceptual modeling phase where abstract representations are created to capture specific aspects of the physical twin, followed by a design phase that builds detailed physical models (e.g., CAD or dynamic models). These models are persisted and continuously integrated into the Digital Twin rather than discarded after deployment. During operation, calibration algorithms update the physics and cyber models with the latest sensor data, producing updated model parameters. The monitoring component then examines this data to verify safe and optimal performance. If a violation is detected, a transition occurs to a corrective phase where humans or automated decision‑making agents modify the physical twin. Governance of the lifecycle typically relies on model‑based validation, periodic reassessment of calibration accuracy, and versioned management of model artifacts, ensuring consistency between the Data, Model, and Algorithm layers across all stages."
]
